kelsey-brandt.position: centered in all three sub-panels, waist-up framing, body angled slightly three-quarter left, identical camera in every sub-panel

pose.overall: standing at the sideline, examining her own raised right arm — identical stance all three stages, only the musculature and fabric tension change
pose.left_arm: relaxed at her side, hand open against her skirt
pose.right_arm: raised and bent in front of her chest, palm rotated up as she studies the forearm
pose.hands: exactly two hands: right hand raised palm-up being studied, left hand open at her side — they touch nothing

kelsey-brandt.expression: stage 1: curious frown at her own arm; stage 2: delighted gasp, mouth open, eyebrows up; stage 3: thrilled wide grin looking straight at her bicep

spatial_rules: exactly one person in the image
exactly two hands total: her raised right hand and her lowered left hand
three equal vertical sub-panels, same camera, same distance, same lighting — time passes left to right

stage 1: slim arm, uniform crisp; stage 2: a clean line of new muscle along the raised arm, sleeve-band of the shell top going snug; stage 3: toned sculpted shoulders and arms, top fitted like a glove — growth strictly monotonic, never reverting, uniform fully covering in every stage
lighting: golden hour, warm key from camera-left, identical across all three sub-panels
